journey.name: Nocturne full-screen scroll
journey.description: Verifies the updated scroll behavior from TV Launcher.dc.html: the scrollable surface covers the whole screen and the time/weather header scrolls away with the app grid, returning when the user scrolls back to the top.

actions.action: Verify that the launcher home screen shows a large serif clock with an AM/PM suffix in the top-right corner, with a date line beneath it
Verify that a grid of app cards is visible below the header and one card has an amber focus ring
Press the D-pad down key repeatedly (up to 8 times) until focus reaches the bottom row of the app grid
Verify that the large clock header is no longer visible on screen (it scrolled away with the content)
Verify that app cards extend to the top region of the screen where the header used to be (the scroll surface covers the full screen)
Press the D-pad up key repeatedly (up to 8 times) until focus reaches the top row of the app grid
Verify that the large serif clock header is visible again in the top-right corner
